queries.question: For each eco lodge, provide me the names of the practices available at that lodge
queries.sql: select eco_lodges.name , sustainable_practices.practice_name from Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices join Sustainable_Practices on Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices.practice_id = Sustainable_Practices.practice_id join Eco_Lodges on Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices.eco_lodge_id = Eco_Lodges.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?practice_name WHERE {
  ?eco_lodges_sustainable_practices a :Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices .
  ?sustainable_practices a :Sustainable_Practices .
  ?eco_lodges_sustainable_practices p:hasSustainable_Practices ?sustainable_practices .
  ?eco_lodges a :Eco_Lodges .
  ?eco_lodges_sustainable_practices p:hasEco_Lodges ?eco_lodges .
  ?eco_lodges p:name ?name .
  ?sustainable_practices p:practice_name ?practice_name .
}

queries.question: Provide me the names of practices that we have for every eco lodge
queries.sql: SELECT Sustainable_Practices.practice_name  from Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices join Sustainable_Practices on Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices.practice_id = Sustainable_Practices.practice_id join Eco_Lodges on Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices.eco_lodge_id = Eco_Lodges.id   GROUP BY Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices.practice_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Eco_Lodges_Sustainable_Practices.eco_lodge_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Eco_Lodges)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide me the names of practices that we have for every eco lodge
